_comment: GCS Object Lifecycle for the <project>-exports bucket — split retention by
telemetry signal (decided 2026-06-14). Prefix-scoped so each Iceberg table
otel_logs: 10 years, Coldline at 365d. SAFE at 10y ONLY because the logs are
content-free (the fail-closed redaction allow-list, otel-collector.yaml) — a
decade-long internal operational record, not a discoverable client-privilege
surface. otel_traces / otel_metrics: 30 days. audit_events: NO rule here — it
has its own 10-year governance and must never be caught by an otel rule, so no
matchesPrefix below touches iceberg/audit_events/. The entity tables
(iceberg/<table>/, not otel_*) likewise keep their full history and are not
matched here. Scheduled + uniform = defensible deletion; content-free => no
preservation duty, so auto-expiry is not spoliation.
